epics.title: Ecommerce and Marketplace Website Automation
epics.description: Large cross-site regression coverage for major ecommerce flows.

features.title: Shopping Discovery and Cart Management
features.description: Search, filter, detail page validation, cart and wishlist coverage.

user_stories.title: Amazon public shopping flow validation
user_stories.description: Validate key anonymous buyer flows on amazon.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open homepage and verify global search box is visible and enabled
Search for 'wireless mouse' and verify result list count is greater than zero
Apply a category or brand filter and verify selected filter chip is displayed
Open first product detail page and verify title, price block, and main image are present
Change quantity selector if available and verify selection persists
Add product to cart if available and verify cart badge increases

user_stories.title: eBay search and sort behavior
user_stories.description: Validate search result sorting and item page consistency on ebay.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open ebay homepage and verify search input and search button are visible
Search for 'mechanical keyboard' and validate results render without error banner
Apply sort by price or best match and verify active sort selection is reflected in UI
Open a result item and verify item title and price are displayed
Validate seller information section is present on item page
Navigate back to results and verify previous query remains in search box

user_stories.title: Etsy catalog exploration
user_stories.description: Validate handmade marketplace browsing on etsy.com.
acceptance_criteria: Load Etsy homepage and verify top navigation categories are displayed
Search for 'ceramic mug' and verify at least one listing card is visible
Open a listing and verify listing title, price, and shop name are present
Validate image gallery supports next or thumbnail interaction
If personalization or options exist, select one option and verify UI updates
Attempt to add to cart and verify action feedback is displayed

user_stories.title: Walmart storefront smoke coverage
user_stories.description: Validate key homepage-to-product journey on walmart.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Walmart homepage and verify location or delivery banner loads
Search for 'air fryer' and verify result grid appears
Use price filter range and verify result count or products update
Open first product and verify ratings and review count area is visible
Check availability section for shipping or pickup messaging
Add to cart if enabled and confirm cart confirmation UI appears

user_stories.title: Target product browsing regression
user_stories.description: Validate category and product detail rendering on target.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Target homepage and verify global nav loads
Search for 'coffee maker' and verify results are listed
Apply rating or shipping filter and verify filter token appears
Open a product detail page and verify product title and price render
Validate pickup or shipping options section exists
Use breadcrumb to return and confirm user remains in same search context

epics.title: Travel, Hospitality, and Content Platform Automation
epics.description: User journey coverage for booking and content-consumption websites.

features.title: Search, Results, and Detail Validation
features.description: Validate date-based search forms and content details across travel and media sites.

user_stories.title: Booking.com destination search flow
user_stories.description: Validate hotel destination search behavior on booking.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Booking homepage and verify destination input is present
Enter destination city and select autocomplete option
Set check-in and check-out dates and verify summary reflects selected dates
Run search and verify property result cards are displayed
Apply one filter such as price, stars, or review score and verify active filter appears
Open a property detail page and verify room options or booking CTA is visible

user_stories.title: Airbnb stay discovery flow
user_stories.description: Validate listing discovery and detail navigation on airbnb.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Airbnb homepage and verify stay search controls are visible
Enter destination and select valid date range
Submit search and verify map or listing cards render
Apply one filter (price/type/amenities) and verify result update
Open a listing and verify host section and amenities section are visible
Validate reservation call-to-action area is present

user_stories.title: Tripadvisor attraction discovery
user_stories.description: Validate search and detail content on tripadvisor.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Tripadvisor homepage and verify search field is displayed
Search for a city attraction and verify results page loads
Filter by category if available and confirm selection in UI
Open a result detail page and verify title and rating are shown
Validate reviews section renders with at least one review block
Navigate photos tab and verify gallery content is visible

user_stories.title: Wikipedia article navigation and search
user_stories.description: Validate article lookup and navigation on wikipedia.org.
acceptance_criteria: Open Wikipedia homepage and verify search input is focused or visible
Search for 'Software testing' and verify article page opens
Validate article heading and first paragraph are visible
Use table of contents link and verify viewport navigates to section
Open a referenced internal link and verify new article heading updates
Return back and verify original article state

user_stories.title: IMDB title page information checks
user_stories.description: Validate movie/series detail page content on imdb.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open IMDB homepage and verify search bar is present
Search for a known title and verify top results appear
Open title detail page and verify title header and year are visible
Validate rating section and vote count are shown
Open cast section and verify at least one cast card appears
Navigate to user reviews and verify review blocks are rendered

epics.title: Developer, Learning, and Utility Website Automation
epics.description: Coverage for docs/search/community and accountless productivity experiences.

features.title: Navigation, Search, and Interaction
features.description: Validate core interactive behavior on developer and learning platforms.

user_stories.title: GitHub repository search
user_stories.description: Validate public repository search and repository page rendering on github.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open GitHub homepage and verify search input is available
Search for 'playwright' and verify repository results list appears
Apply language filter if available and verify filter is active
Open first repository and verify repo title and star section are shown
Open README tab area and verify markdown content block is rendered
Open issues tab and verify page loads without access errors

user_stories.title: Stack Overflow question discovery
user_stories.description: Validate search and question detail pages on stackoverflow.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Stack Overflow homepage and verify top search field is visible
Search for 'python asyncio' and verify question result list appears
Sort by newest or relevant and verify selected sort state
Open a question page and verify question title and tags are shown
Validate answer section renders with one or more answer blocks
Use share or copy link action and verify action control is present

user_stories.title: Medium publication browsing
user_stories.description: Validate content feed and article reading experience on medium.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Medium homepage and verify main feed items are visible
Search for topic 'automation testing' and verify relevant stories are listed
Open a story and verify article title and author area are visible
Scroll article and verify progress indicator or sticky controls update
Open author profile link and verify author page renders
Return to feed and confirm prior navigation context

user_stories.title: Coursera course search
user_stories.description: Validate search and course preview interactions on coursera.org.
acceptance_criteria: Open Coursera homepage and verify search input is visible
Search for 'data science' and verify course cards display
Apply beginner level or language filter and verify active selection
Open a course detail page and verify syllabus or overview section exists
Verify enrollment or audit call-to-action is present
Navigate to instructor section and verify instructor cards are shown

user_stories.title: Weather.com location lookup
user_stories.description: Validate location search and forecast panels on weather.com.
acceptance_criteria: Open Weather.com and verify location search control is visible
Search for a city and verify selected location updates in header
Validate current weather panel shows temperature and condition
Open hourly forecast and verify timeline entries are rendered
Open 10-day forecast and verify day cards are visible
Change to another location and verify forecast content refreshes
